title: Foundry App Verification Report
description: Schema for browser verification results after testing Falcon Foundry apps

apps.description: Verification results for each app tested

app_name.description: Name of the Foundry app verified

run.description: Run number (1-based) from the A/B test

install.description: Whether the app installed successfully with credential prompt

ui.description: Whether the UI extension rendered correctly on the detection details page

workflow.description: Whether the on-demand workflow executed successfully

notes.description: Any issues, warnings, or observations during verification
